exact_claim: This campus primarily serves major AI inference workloads.
evidence_for: Company states high-density AI racks are deployed.
Utility filing references accelerated power profile.
evidence_against: No public tenant roster confirms AI-only workloads.
unknowns: Share of non-AI enterprise workload remains unknown.
explanation: Signals suggest AI relevance, but direct independent verification is incomplete.

exact_claim: The project will create 500 permanent jobs.
evidence_against: Comparable facilities report materially lower permanent staffing.
explanation: Claim may include temporary and vendor roles; permanent count uncertain.
